events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Blood Red Sky featuring special guest Kitty O’neal & The Chain Gang. Blood Red Sky is Northern California’s premier tribute to U2, delivering a powerful live experience that captures the sound, energy, and spirit of one of rock’s most iconic bands. With a setlist spanning U2’s catalog—from early anthems to chart-topping hits—the band brings fans an authentic and high-energy celebration of the music. Adding to the night, Sacramento radio personality Kitty O’Neal joins the show with The Chain Gang, bringing a special set of Pretenders classics to the stage. The result is a high-energy evening of timeless hits, iconic sounds, and pure rock nostalgia. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with Groovy Judy & The Summer of Love Revue
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Groovy Judy & The Summer of Love Revue. This band brings the spirit of the psychedelic ‘60s roaring back to life with a vibrant, feel-good stage show packed with iconic hits. Fronted by Bay Area guitarist and performer Groovy Judy—known for her high-energy style, crowd interaction, and influences ranging from Jimi Hendrix to Sly and the Family Stone—this far-out revue celebrates the music and message of the era. Featuring songs from The Mamas & the Papas, Santana, and Jimi Hendrix, the show channels the peace, love, and groove of the Summer of Love with colorful vibes, infectious energy, and a dance-all-night atmosphere. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Manzanita. They are a Indie Folk band from Northern California with blends of Americana and Country. A Manzanita performance is a huge sound from two men. Aaron Shively’s pedal steel playing is seasoned and tasteful with a ‘Hammond organ-like’ tone. His mandolin will delight any bluegrass lover. Nick Foster fronts with his parlor-style acoustic guitar, harmonica, kick drum and tambourine simultaneously. Original songwriting with storytelling, catchy vocal melodies and powerful harmonies give this duo a classic and eclectic sound all can enjoy. You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

Since 2006, one of Sacramento‘s longest performing cover bands, consists of four experience performers, all of whom have been playing in popular Sacramento area bands throughout the years. events.title: On Stage with Halfway Inn
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Halfway Inn. Prepare to be electrified by the dynamic energy of Halfway Inn, a powerhouse Hard Rock band that demands your attention. Their electrifying performances transport you through the greatest hits of past decades, igniting the stage with their relentless passion for music. A regular fixture in Sacramento’s vibrant music scene, Halfway Inn consistently leaves their mark on diverse venues across the region. Their live shows are nothing short of spectacular, as they pour their hearts and souls into each performance, captivating the audience with an unforgettable blend of raw talent and captivating showmanship. Don’t miss the chance to experience Halfway Inn in action – it’s not just a concert; it’s a musical journey that will leave you craving more. Here’s what you can expect… 70’s Vintage Hard Rock: UFO, THIN LIZZY, BAD COMPANY, LED ZEPPELIN, AC/DC, QUEEN,LYNYRD SKYNYRD 80’s Arena Rock: Y&T, EDDIE MONEY, DANZIG, SCORPIONS,IRON MAIDEN, POISON, BRYAN ADAMS, WHITESNAKE 90’s ALTERNATIVE/GRUNGE: PEARL JAM, THE TOADIES,BUSH, STP, LIVE, SEVEN MARY THREE 2000’s Bangers: BUCK CHERRY, FINGER ELEVEN, PUDDLE OF MUD, DEAD DAISIES AND MANY MORE! Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with 120 Minutes
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by 120 Minutes. Sacramento’s ultimate time machine to the golden age of rock — this powerhouse band slams through the best of 90’s and early 2000’s alternative, grunge, and hard-hitting rock with raw energy and a rebel soul. Fronted by both the gritty vocals of Jon Grant and Owen Myers, the band features their ripping guitar work and keyboard melodies, respectively. Guitarists Alex Schmidt and Brian Ilagan shred with precision and passion, while Dave Wong lays down the thunder on bass and Gar Garvey keeps the heartbeat pounding on drums. From the anthems of The Smashing Pumpkins, Pearl Jam and Alice In Chains to the pulse of Foo Fighters, CAKE, Bush and more, 120 Minutes doesn’t just play the soundtrack of a generation—they ignite it. This band is a must-see for anyone who ever wore Doc Martens, blasted their car stereo, or just wanted to rock without apology. Get ready to relive the era when guitars ruled, angst was an art form, and every track hit like a shot of adrenaline. 120 Minutes brings it all back—louder, tighter, and harder than ever. Are you ready to feel it again? You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

Known for their exceptional musicianship and infectious groove, this band delivers the ultimate Blues experience that will have you dancing from the first note to the last. Expect a soul-stirring mix of classic blues hits, modern interpretations, and original tunes that will leave you feeling inspired and uplifted. Don’t miss out on this unforgettable evening of music, energy, and memories! You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: Hump Day Live’s Jam Nite with Melissa & Andrew
events.description: Join us at High-Hand Brewery as we launch our new Hump Day Jam Nite! Every Wednesday, we’re opening the stage to musicians of all kinds—bring your axe, your voice, your full band, or just the urge to play. When you arrive, find Melissa to sign up and lock in your spot. High-Hand’s pro backline will be ready for you. Solo players will be paired up into spontaneous jam groups, and together you’ll decide what to play—keeping it loose, creative, and fun. It’s all about rocking out, connecting with fellow musicians, and celebrating the amazing music community we’re surrounded by. Each week will also feature a guest band to keep the night energized and inspiring. Come jam, hang out, and make your Wednesday groove. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with Manzanita
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Manzanita. They are a Indie Folk band from Northern California with blends of Americana and Country. A Manzanita performance is a huge sound from two men. Aaron Shively’s pedal steel playing is seasoned and tasteful with a ‘Hammond organ-like’ tone. His mandolin will delight any bluegrass lover. Nick Foster fronts with his parlor-style acoustic guitar, harmonica, kick drum and tambourine simultaneously. Original songwriting with storytelling, catchy vocal melodies and powerful harmonies give this duo a classic and eclectic sound all can enjoy. You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with The Wayward Buffalo
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by The Wayward Buffalo. Plan for an unforgettable evening with The Wayward Buffalo—a Sacramento-area folk-rock/Americana ensemble whose performances feel like gathering around a campfire with old friends. Their soulful storytelling, driving guitar riffs, and soaring harmonies offer a uniquely warm, authentic experience that draws listeners into each song’s emotional journey. With an intimate stage presence and the genuine energy of friends making music together, their gigs are both adventurous and heartfelt—perfect for anyone who treasures music made with sincerity and meant to bring people together. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

With decades of experience entertaining at venues across California, including casinos, corporate events, weddings, fairs, clubs, wineries, and concert events, RocKHaven is renowned for their engaging shows and musical versatility. events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Skyler’s Pool featuring Kitty O’neal & A Little Mayhem Band. This Sacramento rock band that plays covers and original music and features husband and wife duo Kitty O’Neal and Kurt Spataro. Playing music in different bands together since the 80’s, Kitty is also the Afternoon News Anchor on KFBK AM/FM and Kurt is the Executive Chef/Co-Owner in the Paragary Restaurant Group. Popular local musician Lori Sacco is on keyboards/vocals with rhythm section Bob LoRusso on bass and Curtis Blankenship on drums. events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Christopher Scott, an Indiana-born musician whose passion for classic country, rock, and blues has shaped him from an early age. A multi-instrumentalist who began learning guitar under the guidance of his uncle and mentor David Bowman, Scott has honed his craft across guitar, bass, drums, and piano—often recording entire projects on his own. Blending heartfelt storytelling with the timeless spirit of 80s and 90s country, Christopher Scott delivers melodic songs that connect with audiences and keep them singing along. A true independent artist, he brings an authentic love for country music and its roots to every performance. You can learn more about him by clicking here to visit their website. events.title: On Stage with 120 Minutes
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by 120 Minutes. Sacramento’s ultimate time machine to the golden age of rock — this powerhouse band slams through the best of 90’s and early 2000’s alternative, grunge, and hard-hitting rock with raw energy and a rebel soul. Fronted by both the gritty vocals of Jon Grant and Owen Myers, the band features their ripping guitar work and keyboard melodies, respectively. Guitarists Alex Schmidt and Brian Ilagan shred with precision and passion, while Dave Wong lays down the thunder on bass and Gar Garvey keeps the heartbeat pounding on drums. From the anthems of The Smashing Pumpkins, Pearl Jam and Alice In Chains to the pulse of Foo Fighters, CAKE, Bush and more, 120 Minutes doesn’t just play the soundtrack of a generation—they ignite it. This band is a must-see for anyone who ever wore Doc Martens, blasted their car stereo, or just wanted to rock without apology. Get ready to relive the era when guitars ruled, angst was an art form, and every track hit like a shot of adrenaline. 120 Minutes brings it all back—louder, tighter, and harder than ever. Are you ready to feel it again? You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.
